headline: “I Need to Pay Off the Mafia, So I’ll Go Borrow From the Cartel”: Dave Ramsey to a Caller Wanting a HELOC for Amex Debt and a New Car
summary: A caller to The Ramsey Show asked Dave Ramsey and George Kamel whether he should take out a home equity line of credit to wipe out a credit card balance and buy a replacement vehicle. Ramsey’s reaction was instant: “Wait, is this a prank call, dude? You said longtime listener and then you mentioned three ... “I Need to Pay Off the Mafia, So I’ll Go Borrow From the Cartel”: Dave Ramsey to a Caller Wanting a HELOC for Amex Debt and a New Car
